creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
thanks anyway,   been asked before.

too site specific, does not account for all errors.  does not restart 
other programs that depend on sa-updates. too many variables to be 
globally applied.

not worth the tech support issues it will attract.

ports committer: please mark rejected by maintainer.

--
